evals.prompt: 帮我做一个D&D角色属性面板的React组件，要有6个属性值（力量、敏捷、体质、智力、感知、魅力）的展示，每个属性要显示数值和调整值。风格参考暗黑破坏神那种暗黑奇幻风格。输出单个jsx文件。
evals.expected_output: A single .jsx file with a dark fantasy styled D&D ability score panel. Should have proper 8px grid spacing, glassmorphism, gold accents, Cinzel typography, hover states, and layered shadows.

evals.prompt: Create a React character selection card grid for a fantasy RPG game. Show 6 character classes (warrior, mage, rogue, healer, ranger, paladin) as selectable cards with icons, names, and short descriptions. Dark theme, make it look really polished and professional. Single jsx file please.
evals.expected_output: A single .jsx file with a grid of character class cards. Should feature selection states with glow effects, staggered entrance animations, proper typography hierarchy, dark fantasy color palette, and all interactive states (hover/selected/focus).

evals.prompt: 我需要一个奇幻风格的角色创建向导UI，包含3个步骤：选择种族、选择职业、分配属性。要有步骤导航条，左边是角色预览区，右边是选择区。暗色主题，要有氛围感。React单文件组件。
evals.expected_output: A single .jsx file with a multi-step character creation wizard. Left-right split layout, step navigation with active/completed states, atmospheric background effects, dark fantasy glassmorphism, proper component structure with state management.
